basic_details.job_title: Kannur University Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Kannur University is recruiting 1 Assistant Engineer (Electrical) purely on contract basis.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | eligibility: Candidates who are included in the Rank List published by Kerala Public Service Commission (KPSC) for Assistant Engineer (Electrical) posts in Universities of Kerala (Rank List No. 1035/2025/SS VI, Category 070/2024) | age limit: As per the existing KPSC Rank List validity
qualification.education_qualification: As per the qualification prescribed for the post by KPSC

vacancy_details.details: Name of the Post: Assistant Engineer (Electrical) - Contract No. of Vacancy: 01 (One)

selection_process: Selection will be made directly from the valid Kerala PSC Rank List. The appointing authority reserves the right to reject all or any of the applications without assigning any reason.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can submit their applications online only through the official website of Kannur University.
Go to the Recruitment / Vacancy section
Click on the link for Assistant Engineer (Electrical) Contract Post
Fill the online application form with correct details
Submit the application before the deadline
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference
important_instructions: This appointment is purely on contract basis for one year. Only candidates from the specified active KPSC Rank List are eligible to apply. The University reserves the right to reject any or all applications without assigning any reason. No further claims will be entertained after the last date. Selected candidate will be governed by the terms and conditions of contractual appointment in Kannur University.

content_sections.heading: Kannur University Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Kannur University, Kerala has issued Notification No. No.AD D/AD D2/21523/2024 dated 04.07.2026 for engagement of Assistant Engineer (Electrical) on contract basis in the University. Download Kannur University Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Kannur University Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Kannur University is recruiting 1 Assistant Engineer (Electrical) purely on contract basis.

content_sections.heading: Kannur University Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made directly from the valid Kerala PSC Rank List. The appointing authority reserves the right to reject all or any of the applications without assigning any reason.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Kannur University Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates can submit their applications online only through the official website of Kannur University. Steps to Apply: Visit the official website www.kannuruniv.ac.in Go to the Recruitment / Vacancy section Click on the link for Assistant Engineer (Electrical) Contract Post Fill the online application form with correct details Upload necessary documents if required Submit the application before the deadline Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference Last Date: 15 July 2026 (5:00 PM)

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Kannur University Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This appointment is purely on contract basis for one year. Only candidates from the specified active KPSC Rank List are eligible to apply. The University reserves the right to reject any or all applications without assigning any reason. No further claims will be entertained after the last date. Selected candidate will be governed by the terms and conditions of contractual appointment in Kannur University.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Kannur University Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 15 July 2026 till 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for Assistant Engineer (Electrical) post in Kannur University?
faq.answer: Only candidates included in the Kerala PSC Rank List No. 1035/2025/SS VI, Cat. 070/2024 are eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Assistant Engineer (Electrical) on contract basis at Kannur University?
faq.answer: Selected candidate will get a consolidated pay of Rs. 35,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are announced in Kannur University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Assistant Engineer (Electrical) on contract.

faq.question: Q5. What is the period of appointment for this Kannur University post?
faq.answer: The appointment is on contract for a period of One Year.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply online for Kannur University Assistant Engineer position?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply through the official website www.kannuruniv.ac.in using the recruitment link.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent government job in Kannur University?
faq.answer: No. This is a purely contractual appointment for one year.

faq.question: Q8. Do I need Kerala PSC Rank List to apply for Kannur University AE Electrical post?
faq.answer: Yes, only candidates from the specified KPSC Rank List are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for Kannur University contract recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selected Assistant Engineer be posted?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be posted at Kannur University Campus, Kerala.
